title: The Maid I Hired Recently Is Mysterious
overview: Having lost his parents in a car crash, Yuuri is left to live in the mansion on his own. One day, a beautiful maid, Lilith, shows up, offering to work for him for free.

title: The Young Master, the Cat, and the Morning Glory
overview: Yuuri has gotten used to living with Lilith, but he’s still suspicious of her. One day, he spots her leaving the building seeming somewhat anxious.

title: Gojouin Tsukasa Is Precocious
overview: Tsukasa, a classmate of Yuuri's, is concerned for his well-being after having lost his parents.

title: Does the Young Master Like Pudding?
overview: Lilith becomes desperate to convince Yuuri that she is not suspicious.

title: My Precious...
overview: Lilith helps Yuuri prepare for the upcoming sports day events.

title: The Maid I Hired Recently Is Weird!?
overview: Yuuri finds himself taking care of Lilith for once when she catches a cold.

title: Not in My Textbook
overview: Tsukasa invites Yuuri over for a discussion about love.

title: The Girl With the Purple Eyes
overview: Lilith approaches Fujisaki for advice on how to get Yuuri to open up to her more.

title: Complicated, Convoluted, Perplexing, Honest Feelings
overview: Lilith's former coworker and classmate, Natsume, comes knocking on Yuuri's door, demanding that Lilith comes back.

title: For Whom Do the Stars Fall
overview: Christmas is coming, and Yuuri and Natsume plot a surprise party for Lilith.

title: It Must Have Always Been...
overview: A man visits the mansion while Natsume and Yuuri are out running errands.
